states.name: Chronos
states.title: Primordial of Time
states.description: Chronos, the Primordial of Time, not only has the magical capacities that rival the gods, she is also able to manipulate all forms of time at will. Yet, she imposed strict rules upon herself, lowering herself to the level of a time mage. For the power of time is a force to be feared—wielded without restraint, it can unmake the fate of the world itself.

states.name: Chronos
states.title: Primordial of Time
states.description: As a Primordial, except in extremely rare circumstances, she forbade herself from interacting with humans. Her will and words were always conveyed to the world through Rolotia. Over time, Rolotia became more than just a conduit to the mortal world, she became one Chronos could call a true friend.

states.name: Chronos
states.title: Primordial of Time
states.description: Even Rolotia has no idea how Chronos usually lives. But one day, when Rolotia was visiting the Temple of Time, she paused in front of a particular door. From within, she could hear shrill cries of excitement and heavy breathing. This room was strictly off-limits, a room stacked high with books that should never be opened.
